x_future_connectors.name: asx-announcements
x_future_connectors.purpose: Search and fetch public ASX announcements for listed furniture, bedding, retail, and homewares peers.

x_future_connectors.name: abs-retail-trade
x_future_connectors.purpose: Fetch Australian Bureau of Statistics retail trade and household-goods demand data.

x_future_connectors.name: company-investor-pages
x_future_connectors.purpose: Monitor public investor relations pages for Adairs, Nick Scali, Temple & Webster, Harvey Norman, and other relevant peers.

x_future_connectors.name: competitor-web-monitor
x_future_connectors.purpose: Monitor public competitor websites for promotions, range changes, delivery offers, and store-network updates.

x_future_connectors.name: microsoft-365-output
x_future_connectors.purpose: Write the approved digest and source log into Word, Excel, or PowerPoint using governed Microsoft 365 connectors.
